inputs.label: Total Weight
inputs.businessContext: The total weight of the vehicle including cargo.

businessContext_i18n.en: The total weight of the vehicle including cargo.
businessContext_i18n.de: Das Gesamtgewicht des Fahrzeugs einschließlich Ladung.

inputs.label: Wheelbase
inputs.businessContext: Distance between the front and rear axles.

businessContext_i18n.en: Distance between the front and rear axles.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ön ve arka akslar arasındaki mesafe.

inputs.label: CG Distance from Front Axle
inputs.businessContext: Horizontal distance from the front axle to the center of gravity.

businessContext_i18n.en: Horizontal distance from the front axle to the center of gravity.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ön aks ile ağırlık merkezi arasındaki yatay mesafe.
businessContext_i18n.de: Horizontaler Abstand von der Vorderachse zum Schwerpunkt.

inputs.label: Dynamic Load Factor
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier to account for dynamic forces during motion (e.g., braking, acceleration). Typical range 1.0 - 2.0.

businessContext_i18n.en: Multiplier to account for dynamic forces during motion (e.g., braking, acceleration). Typical range 1.0 - 2.0.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hareket sırasındaki (frenleme, hızlanma gibi) dinamik kuvvetleri hesaba katmak için çarpan. Tipik aralık 1.0 - 2.0.
businessContext_i18n.de: Multiplikator zur Berücksichtigung dynamischer Kräfte während der Bewegung (z. B. Bremsen, Beschleunigen). Typischer Bereich 1,0 - 2,0.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
